Database schema blueprint

These are the first server tables the local ledgers are already shaped to become.

profiles
Identity service

id, email, role, status, verified, company, country, phone, last_active_at

auth_sessions
Identity service

id, user_id, role, issued_at, expires_at, revoked_at

requests
Request service

id, customer_id, status, title, check_result, active_quote_id, confirmed_quote_id, updated_at

request_messages
Request service

id, request_id, author_id, role, body, blocks, created_at

attachments
Storage service

id, request_id, message_id, uploaded_by, name, size, type, storage_object_id

storage_objects
Storage service

id, attachment_id, bucket, object_path, status, access_scope, created_at

quotes
Quote service

id, request_id, version, amount, currency, basis_message_ids, status, released_at

orders
Order service

id, request_id, customer_id, status, harness_price, shipping, address, payment_status, production_status

payments
Payment adapter

id, order_id, provider, session_id, status, amount, currency, provider_reference, confirmed_at

shipments
Shipping adapter

id, order_id, carrier, service, status, tracking_number, tracking_url, events

order_messages
Order service

id, order_id, author_id, author_role, body, visibility, created_at

notifications
Notification router

id, user_id, role, request
